summary: src/lib/kdp/page-template.ts now converts each page's input image bytes to CMYK JPEG via sharp.toColorspace('cmyk') before pdf-lib embedJpg(). Required for KDP PDF/X-1a strict spec.

implementation.lazy_load: sharp is dynamically imported inside toCmykJpeg() so text-only sample renders (e.g. scripts/generate_sample_kdp.ts) don't trigger the native binding.

added_helper: fetchPageImage(localUrl) — reads /uploads/<bucket>/<file> from VPS public/ disk into bytes for the future export route

verified.kdp_sample: build/proof/kdp-sample.pdf rebuilt (3697 bytes, PDF 1.7) — text-only path bypasses CMYK step (no images to convert)

operator_verify_step: When the first real story exports (after dispatch 008 walkthrough or a manual /api/book/[id]/export), open the PDF in Adobe Acrobat → File → Properties → Description → Color Space should read DeviceCMYK. Cross-check with `pdfinfo -box <file>` if pdfinfo is installed.
